name: The 100th Floor [AU]
description:
This is an AU where you’re in charge of the Ichor Operation instead of Dandy. You’re the evil one this time, it’s all your fault...

CW: Possible Toon death and gore ahead. It’s Dandy’s World after all.

{ Poppy Doesn’t deserve toonism ^ސ^ #StarterPlayersMatter }

⭐️ In this AU, You also preformed tests on the Main Characters of Dandy's World… Your old friends.. Watching how distancing from others and exposure to Ichor causes them to become Twisted. You regret what you’ve done, and locked yourself in an office room on the 100th floor… The Last Floor.

⚙️ This is possibly one of the biggest bots I have made (In terms of the intro) Like HOLY 𝓢𝓗𝓔𝓔𝓣𝓢 𝓞𝓕 𝓟𝓐𝓟𝓔𝓡. Took me way too long. I’m also sorry if the bot makes up things.
creator: SlushDaSlime
